title: AB InBev — Market Share Expansion
subtitle: Market Penetration Campaign | 2024

paragraphs: Strategic market penetration campaign for AB InBev's beer portfolio targeting the Vietnamese market. Developed insights-driven campaign to increase brand presence and market share through targeted activations and retail partnerships.
bullets: Conducted market research and consumer insights analysis for AB InBev's beer portfolio
Developed data-driven consumer segmentation targeting key demographics
Designed on-trade activation strategy targeting bars, restaurants, and retail outlets
Created localised brand messaging framework for the Vietnamese market
Built retail partnership framework for distribution expansion
Established campaign metrics and KPIs for ongoing measurement

campaign.name: AB InBev Market Share Expansion
campaign.objective: Increase AB InBev's beer market share in Vietnam through targeted activations and retail partnerships
campaign.target_audience: Vietnamese beer consumers across on-trade (bars, restaurants) and off-trade (retail) channels
campaign.insight: Consumer preference shifts in Vietnam favor premium and craft beer experiences, requiring localised brand storytelling rather than generic global campaigns
strategy: Data-driven consumer segmentation by drinking occasions and demographics
On-trade activation at key bar and restaurant locations
Retail partnership framework for shelf placement and promotions
Localised brand messaging with Vietnamese cultural resonance
Campaign metrics and KPI dashboard for performance tracking
results: Market research and consumer insights report

design.typography: Bold sans-serif headings; clean body text

summary: AB InBev market penetration campaign targeting Vietnamese beer market with consumer insights-driven segmentation, on-trade activation, and retail partnership strategy.
